vibe: Modern, elegant, clean, tech, startup premium, barber shop aesthetics
design_principles: High-end SaaS aesthetic with dark backgrounds and subtle neon orange glow.
No generic layouts; use bento grids and asymmetric features presentation.
Typography must be large, confident, and modern.
Micro-interactions: Hover effects on cards, soft glow on buttons, smooth scroll.

navbar.style: Fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300
navbar.state_scrolled: bg-[#0A0A0A]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#262626] py-4 shadow-lg
navbar.mobile_menu: Hamburger menu opening a full-screen dark overlay with large links

hero.headline: Tu barbería. Tu negocio. En tus manos.

cta_primary.style: bg-[#FF5500] hover:bg-[#FF7733] text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-xl transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(255,85,0,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_-5px_rgba(255,85,0,0.6)]

cta_secondary.style: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] hover:border-[#FF5500] text-white py-4 px-8 rounded-xl transition-all

hero.mockups: Realistic Notebook and Phone composition. Use CSS/JSX structural elements to create a sleek dark-mode dashboard wireframe inside the screens. They must animate floating gently.

problem_curiosity.style: Dark cards with subtle 1px border. On hover, apply a soft orange inner glow.

features.layout: Bento grid (mix of col-span-1 and col-span-2) or dense 3-column grid.
features.card_style: bg-[#141414] border border-[#262626] rounded-2xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#FF5500]/50 transition-all duration-300

barber_club_highlight.style: Full-width section with dark image background overlay (use image_urls), heavy vignette, large typography, emphasizing exclusivity.

how_it_works.layout: Horizontal timeline or staggered vertical cards with connecting lines.

pricing.style: Cards with deep dark background. Highlight the 'Salón Avanzado' with a glowing orange border and an 'Recomendado' badge.

footer.elements: Logo, navigation links, contact info, copyright.

floating_whatsapp.style: Fixed bottom-6 right-6 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center

animations.reveal: Framer Motion: initial { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, whileInView { opacity: 1, y: 0 } with staggered children.
animations.hover_glow: Add glowing shadows on hover. Scale up icons slightly.

hero_background_overlay.usage: Use as an absolute background with opacity-20 and mix-blend-screen for a subtle fiery/orange aura in the hero.

barber_club_bg.usage: Use in the BarberClub Highlight section with a heavy #0A0A0A gradient overlay (opacity 80%) so text is highly readable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a React/Tailwind application strictly following this JSON.

Implement the laptop and phone mockups purely with CSS/Tailwind (using dark divs, subtle borders, and placeholder skeleton rectangles) instead of external images, as the user will later swap them for real app screenshots.
All elements must use the Argentine Spanish copy specified.
No generic layout - apply 'E1' principles: bento grids, asymmetry, and generous paddings (p-12 to p-24).
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based naming.
Do not include any backend forms. The CTA buttons MUST link directly to the provided external URLs.
Never use pure black or grey without a slight tint. Use the exact hex codes provided in 'colors'.
Ensure hover states and animations strictly use Framer Motion and Tailwind transitions.
Design the pricing cards as distinct placeholder cards ready for user editing.
